summary: Withdrawal Limits Control System testing completed successfully. Both backend API endpoints (GET/PUT /api/admin/withdrawal-limits) and frontend component (SettingsLimits) work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend service (withdrawal_limits_service.py) correctly implements effective_limit = MIN(global_limit, user_limit)
API endpoints properly require admin authentication
Frontend component uses proper data-testid attributes for all inputs
Toast notifications display correctly on save success

success_rate.backend: 100% - All withdrawal limits API tests passed (6/6 core tests, 3 skipped due to rate limiting)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - Withdrawal Limits tab renders correctly, form loads data, save button works, success toast displays

seed_data_creation: Created test admin account test_admin@sdmrewards.com with is_super_admin=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Withdrawal Limits feature fully tested. Admin login at /admin{DDMMYY} format (e.g., /admin180326 for March 18, 2026). Settings tab requires PIN verification (default: 0000). Test admin credentials available in test_credentials section.

GET /api/admin/withdrawal-limits.notes: Returns momo/bank limits with max_per_tx, daily, weekly, monthly fields

PUT /api/admin/withdrawal-limits.notes: Updates limits and returns success with updated values

admin_settings_page.momo_limits_section: FOUND - Mobile Money (MoMo) Limits with 4 input fields
admin_settings_page.bank_limits_section: FOUND - Bank Transfer Limits with 4 input fields
admin_settings_page.save_functionality: WORKING - Updates value, calls PUT endpoint, shows success toast

features_verified: GET /api/admin/withdrawal-limits - returns global limits (requires admin auth)
PUT /api/admin/withdrawal-limits - updates global limits (requires admin auth)
Admin Dashboard Settings page has 'Withdrawal Limits' tab
SettingsLimits component displays MoMo limits (max_per_tx, daily, weekly, monthly)
SettingsLimits component displays Bank limits (max_per_tx, daily, weekly, monthly)
Save button calls PUT endpoint and shows success toast
